title: Thread replies by default
summary: Reply in the same thread by default; fall back to channel only for new topics or when explicitly requested.
examples: Two sessions posted follow-ups to channel instead of thread
Users repeatedly asked to keep conversations threaded for context

title: Harden input validation on path arguments
summary: Validate and normalize path inputs; reject absolute paths and path traversal; enforce relative paths under the workspace root.
examples: User supplied '/var/tmp/output' causing writes outside workspace
Agent accepted '../' path which could escape repository

title: Use pnpm consistently
summary: Project uses pnpm workspaces; npm/yarn introduce conflicting lockfiles and break installs.
examples: npm install created package-lock.json and caused hoisting mismatch
